metadata.edge_rule: Connect each node to up to its 3 nearest nodes, only when distance <= 35 meters. Edges are undirected and weighted by Haversine distance in meters.
metadata.warning: This is an auto-suggested graph. Manually remove edges that cross walls, fences, locked doors, or non-walkable spaces. New KML node IDs/names were renamed to 'newer_node_###' / 'Newer Node ###' to avoid collisions with existing point_* IDs.
